g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the DNS fix in the MongoDB connection file')
g.text: DNS forced to IPv4, Google resolvers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why reuse the existing MongoDB connection?')
sendPrompt('What does getMongoUri do and why might it throw?')
sendPrompt('How does the retry loop work in the MongoDB connection?')
sendPrompt('What happens after all MongoDB retry attempts fail?')
sendPrompt('What happens immediately after a successful MongoDB connection?')
sendPrompt('What do the Mongoose event listeners do?')
sendPrompt('How does connection pooling help during normal app operation?')
sendPrompt('What sends SIGTERM to a Node process?')
sendPrompt('What does disconnectDB do and why is it important?')
